title: Sealriul
description: Sealriul offers an all new RPG-like dimension, with many mobs to fight and structures to explore
body:
**THIS MOD IS IN THE BETA RELEASE.** Expect bugs and glitches. Report anything in the comments of the mod page on curseforge :)
Also, the primary mod page is on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sealriul)

[Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) required to play mod.

Sealriul adds a brand new RPG like dimension, with mobs to fight and structures to explore!

**How to enter Sealriul Dimension**

First, you have to find a portal keep. Then, you must defeat draugrs and hope one drops a key, which can then be used on locked barrels, scattered about the keep. There's a chance to find a portal gem, which is used on the portal frame (made of "seal stone"). This will grant access to the dimension!

![Portal Keep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0075733525ffa583c6b2e645e8cd89862ad25737.png)

**For more info check out the youtube channel: https://www.youtube.com/@sealriul**

==================================================================
